rationale: Review 1's approve produces the better PR: its docstring already accurately credits the sole imported/central dependency (Mathlib.RingTheory.HopfAlgebra.TensorProduct) for the Hopf instance and functoriality API, matching the stated purpose. Review 2's demanded extra credits for Basic (antipode_comp proof strategy) and Bialgebra.TensorProduct (map lemmas) are neither required by the diff's imports+docstring nor material under the attribution rubric—maintainers would not insist on them, and acting on them adds needless boilerplate.
